<p style="color:#4169E1;font-size:2rem;">有人把汉堡包的面包夹在最中间，你的反应是： </p> (link:"买断他的手脚",(css:"background-color: transparent;border: 2px solid #4169E1;color: #4169E1;width:100%;display:flex;justify-content:center;border-radius:15px;")+(hover-style:(css:"background-color: #4169E1;border: 2px solid #4169E1;color: white;")))[(set:$a to it+(a:"暗黑天使"))(go-to:"14")] (link:"让我也试一试",(css:"background-color: transparent;border: 2px solid #4169E1;color: #4169E1;width:100%;display:flex;justify-content:center;border-radius:15px;")+(hover-style:(css:"background-color: #4169E1;border: 2px solid #4169E1;color: white;")))[(set:$a to it+(a:"千子"))(go-to:"14")] (link:"亵渎汉堡者，取消食堡权",(css:"background-color: transparent;border: 2px solid #4169E1;color: #4169E1;width:100%;display:flex;justify-content:center;border-radius:15px;")+(hover-style:(css:"background-color: #4169E1;border: 2px solid #4169E1;color: white;")))[(set:$a to it+(a:"怀言者"))(go-to:"14")] <center> <p style="color:#4169E1;font-size:2rem;">你掉进一个大坑里，你最先会： </p> (link:"自己动手爬出去",(css:"background-color: transparent;border: 2px solid #4169E1;color: #4169E1;width:100%;display:flex;justify-content:center;border-radius:15px;")+(hover-style:(css:"background-color: #4169E1;border: 2px solid #4169E1;color: white;")))[(set:$a to it+(a:"钢铁勇士"))(go-to:"结果")] (link:"想办法让人救你",(css:"background-color: transparent;border: 2px solid #4169E1;color: #4169E1;width:100%;display:flex;justify-content:center;border-radius:15px;")+(hover-style:(css:"background-color: #4169E1;border: 2px solid #4169E1;color: white;")))[(set:$a to it+(a:"极限战士"))(go-to:"结果")] (link:"太棒了我就死这",(css:"background-color: transparent;border: 2px solid #4169E1;color: #4169E1;width:100%;display:flex;justify-content:center;border-radius:15px;")+(hover-style:(css:"background-color: #4169E1;border: 2px solid #4169E1;color: white;")))[(set:$a to it+(a:"暗鸦守卫"))(go-to:"结果")] {<script> document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--color', '#A89656'); document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg', '#2B2B2B'); </script>}{<script>
